posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Erikyang

Just noticed you posted in the wrong category! No worries I will move your post. I encourage you to look around the community and also wanted to let you know about out fiiver workplace Hire a certified monday.com expert to optimize your workflow? where you can get a certified partner if that is what you are looking for. There are many great resources in the community and we are here to help! fbclid=IwAR3XDXiFJ4Eyg7ZPWzwch2G8KsEm3CWuf99PQ6oRvRBtIbg1ddENob1i7Ms
